message:
test(web): add Jargon component tests

Adds comprehensive tests for the Jargon tooltip/bottom-sheet component:
- Basic rendering with real dictionary data
- Desktop interaction (hover delay, focus, escape key)
- Mobile bottom sheet behavior
- Accessibility attributes (aria-expanded)
- Multiple dictionary terms validation

Uses framer-motion mock to avoid animation timing issues in jsdom.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
